title: Trikkur Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Trikkur Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Trikkur Mahadeva Temple is a rock-cut cave temple in Trikkur village in Thrissur District in Kerala believed to have been built in the 7th or 8th century.
overview.description: Trikkur Mahadeva Temple is a rock-cut cave temple in Trikkur village in Thrissur District in Kerala believed to have been built in the 7th or 8th century. Being a cave temple, Buddhist and Jain monks used the site to meditate alongside the Hindu monks. It is a protected monument under the Department of Archaeology, Govt of Kerala since 1966. The temple and its premises are now owned by Paliyam Trust which is managed by Kshetra Samrakshana Samiti (Temple Protection Committee).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

topPlaces.name: Jerusalem Retreat Center
topPlaces.description: Jerusalem Retreat Center is a Catholic charismatic renewal centre in Thalore, Thrissur city. The centre is managed by the Carmelites of Mary Immaculate, Thrissur.

topPlaces.name: Thalore
topPlaces.description: Thalore is a suburb situated 9 km south of Thrissur city in Kerala, India. It is a part of Thrissur Municipal Corporation and Nenmanikkara Grama Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kainoor
topPlaces.description: Kainoor is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Marathakkara
topPlaces.description: Marathakkara is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Nenmanikkara
topPlaces.description: Nenmanikkara is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies nearer to NH544 near Amballur town.

topPlaces.name: Vendore
topPlaces.description: Vendore is situated in Amballur village in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India. Vendore is situated in between Amballur and Mannampetta.

topPlaces.name: Alagappa Nagar
topPlaces.description: Alagappa Nagar is situated at Amballur Village near Puthukkad town in Mukundapuram Taluk in Thrissur District in Kerala State. Alagappa Nagar is 12.7 km far from Thrissur city.

topPlaces.name: Puthur, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Puthur is a village in the taluk of Thrissur in the Thrissur district of Kerala. It is the location for the upcoming Thrissur Zoological Park Wildlife Conservation & Research Centre park.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Trikkur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Trikkur Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Trikkur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (37 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Trikkur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Trikkur Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Trikkur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Trikkur Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Trikkur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jerusalem Retreat Center, Thalore, Kainoor, Marathakkara, Nenmanikkara.
